programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: Ben and Cristi help two siblings transform a dated legacy home into a modern mountain lodge suited for their large family gatherings.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: A home in La Palma, California goes from dirty and dated to designer showpiece.

programme.title: No Demo Reno
programme.desc: A couple with a baby on the way asks Jenn to make their midcentury modern home more functional while staying true to its 1950s style.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Burned out from working long hours in real estate, an Arizona family looks for relaxation in the jungles of Ojochal, Costa Rica.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A Canadian couple scouts lake and oceanfront properties after winning $1 million on the lottery.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.desc: A family wants their kids to grow up exploring the forest. She needs to commute to work, but he works from home and hopes to get a deck with a view.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: A home in La Palma, California goes from dirty and dated to designer showpiece.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Frank Sinatra impersonator finds new demand for his Las Vegas show south of the border.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Tampa couple searches for a larger house with room for future kids. However, she wants a Mediterranean-style home with a pool-spa combination.

programme.title: Betting On Paradise
programme.desc: With just days until the combined wedding and grand opening, the team kicks construction into overdrive. The knockout pool bar surpasses expectations.

programme.title: Two Steps Home
programme.desc: A teacher wants to upgrade to a bigger house with space for her children and growing baking business.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on a couple's chopped-up ranch house to transform into a bold statement that celebrates rustic elements and a glam open concept.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After a $3 million lottery win, David helps a mother search for a starter home for her eldest daughter in Rochester, New York.

programme.title: Ugliest House In America
programme.desc: A house full of dragons, a home where crazy art has taken over and a gaudy Victorian house full of flare compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan take on a decrepit house from Detroit's past. They hope to turn into a shining beacon of the city's sustainable and renewable future.

programme.title: House Hunters: Cabin Dreams
programme.desc: A family wants their kids to grow up exploring the forest. She needs to commute to work, but he works from home and hopes to get a deck with a view.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: A home in La Palma, California goes from dirty and dated to designer showpiece.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A teacher and his sports reporter wife hunt for a home in the countryside of Surrey, England.

programme.desc: A couple is looking for a home in a kid-friendly neighbourhood in Tampa.

programme.desc: With just days until the combined wedding and grand opening, the team kicks construction into overdrive. The knockout pool bar surpasses expectations.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: The guys take on a desolate duplex and transform it into a dream home. Keith sees this as an opportunity to create a chic, English countryside escape.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A successful attorney wants to buy her first home in Tampa, Florida. She wants a condo that's near the courthouse with outdoor space for her dogs.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a property in Garden Grove, Calif., that needs only cosmetic repairs and improvements.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on a client who could help make or break their design business. They transform a living area into an open concept kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Face-Off
programme.desc: It's Fix My Flip vs. Help! I Wrecked My House as Jasmine Roth and Page Turner go head-to-head to see who has the best ambitious addition.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David helps a mother and her daughter reunite to find a home in honour of their late son and brother in Ojai, California.

programme.title: Ugliest House In America
programme.desc: A house where art has taken over the walls, a former church with a terrifying hole and a once-glamorous home compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Married To Real Estate
programme.desc: A family is anxious to get out of his mother's house and find a place of their own. They're looking for a home with an open design for entertaining.

programme.desc: After moving for her job a year ago, a young woman is ready to lay down roots and buy a house in North Carolina.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David Bromstad helps John find a home where he can relax and entertain friends in Hollywood, FL.

programme.desc: A successful attorney wants to buy her first home in Tampa, Florida. She wants a condo that's near the courthouse with outdoor space for her dogs.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a property in Garden Grove, Calif., that needs only cosmetic repairs and improvements.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple from Agoura Hills, CA, fulfills their dream of living the Chianti way of life in Italy.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple is on the hunt for a smaller home in Appleton, Wisconsin. She's looking for a four-square house with historic charm and classic details.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: A California couple faces a total gut job when they take on a Northern California fixer to be closer to family.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: Kentucky couple's dreams of flipping homes to help restore their town leads them to a big project: a pre-Civil War home that's falling apart.

programme.title: Married To Real Estate
programme.desc: A family is ready to park their tiny house on wheels and put down roots in Poncey-Highland, Georgia. Egypt and Mike search for the dream vintage home.

programme.title: Celebrity Iou
programme.desc: Brad Pitt recruits Drew and Jonathan to help him surprise his friend and makeup artist of 30 years by renovating her detached garage.

programme.title: Married To Real Estate
programme.desc: Egypt and Mike help a blended family find and create their first house together in Fairburn, Georgia, with the perfect parents' hideaway.

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn purchase a house in Manoa with a mould-infested room and major roof damage, and they must take on a second flip to cover the cost.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A successful attorney wants to buy her first home in Tampa, Florida. She wants a condo that's near the courthouse with outdoor space for her dogs.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a property in Garden Grove, Calif., that needs only cosmetic repairs and improvements.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A single mother with an empty nest wants to return to Grand Bahama Island and start a business.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple disagrees over whether they want a grand or cozy vacation home in Destin, Florida.

programme.desc: After moving for her job a year ago, a young woman is ready to lay down roots and buy a house in North Carolina.

programme.title: First Time Fixer

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: Kentucky couple's dreams of flipping homes to help restore their town leads them to a big project: a pre-Civil War home that's falling apart.

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn purchase an abandoned house in Pearl City with rotting floors and work tirelessly on a stunning renovation to honour its legacy.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A woman's bucket list leads her to settle near her best friend in Madrid. But finding a city centre place with a balcony view may be out of reach.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: Now that remote working is an option, an Iowa couple searches for a home along the warm waters of Marathon, Florida.

programme.title: Celebrity Iou
programme.desc: Jeremy Renner is moving his mum to Los Angeles to be closer to her family.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: Hilton and Fiona want to turn their historic Baltimore fixer-upper into a home where they can put down family roots and more than 200 plant roots.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: Despite being new to home renovation, Hilary and David are taking on a complete interior renovation of their newly purchased Waco fixer.

programme.title: Married To Real Estate
programme.desc: After a fire destroys actress and comedian Cocoa Brown's home. She and her son look to Egypt and Mike to either restore or build their dream home.

programme.desc: A woman's bucket list leads her to settle near her best friend in Madrid. But finding a city centre place with a balcony view may be out of reach.

programme.title: Rock The Block
programme.desc: It's week three and the teams tackle their main suites and make massive moves as some desperately seek their first win of the competition.
